visual_description: In a dimly lit, narrow room with a greenish, moody ambiance, a group of men are gathered. The camera is positioned at a medium distance, capturing the tense interaction between the characters. On the right, an older man with short, graying hair, dressed in a light-colored suit jacket and a white collared shirt, gestures emphatically with his right hand. To his left, a group of younger men, mostly dressed in dark clothing, stand together, observing him. The background consists of a wall with light-colored tiles and several framed pictures hanging on it. A dark doorway is visible behind the group. In the top left corner of the screen, the white Chinese characters "风行网" are displayed. The camera remains stationary, maintaining a steady focus on the central group. The audio opens with a tense, rhythmic, and percussive instrumental track, creating a suspenseful and confrontational atmosphere. A man speaks in a firm, commanding voice, giving a direct order: "电话都拿出来" (Take out all the phones). Another man responds with a simple, slightly hesitant "哦" (Oh), acknowledging the command. The background is filled with the low, indistinct murmur of other people, adding to the tense and serious
